mapper.select: SELECT id, device_code AS deviceCode, device_name AS deviceName, type_id AS typeId, install_location AS installLocation, ip_addr AS ipAddr, serial_no AS serialNo, channel_no AS channelNo, verify_code AS verifyCode, online_status::text AS onlineStatus, line_y AS lineY, roi, ref_width AS refWidth, ref_height AS refHeight FROM camera WHERE id = #{cameraId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO camera ( device_code, serial_no, channel_no, device_name, type_id, online_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceCode}, #{serialNo}, #{channelNo}, #{deviceName}, #{typeId}, 'offline', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE camera SET line_y = COALESCE(#{lineY}, line_y), roi = COALESCE(#{roi}, roi), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{cameraId}
UPDATE camera SET device_name = #{deviceName}, online_status = CAST(#{onlineStatus} AS camera_online_status), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{cameraId}
